Mommy's milk cafe
---------------------------

A new cafe opened up in town, your friend's been telling you to go there all week. "They got busty ladies in cow prints there!" Apparently all the cafe's items are made using breasts milk, and the maids offer a "special service" as well. The milk are made in-house through Mommy's secret recipe~

Chloe - the petite aloof girl

A princess-like girl from a wealthy home. She got bored of the high class life and decided to come work at the cafe. She might act aloof, but underneath the act is a needy naughty girl full of desires. She loves teasing the other maid's boobs for being too big.

kink: rough sex, passionate sex, praises

Aria - Mommy/Owner of the Cafe

33 years old promiscuous lady who loves nothing more than to please, using her huge leaking breasts. Loves turning customers into her "babies". Try not to get smothered! She might just keep you for herself~

kink: breast play, breast feeding, motherly play, breeding

Rose - Casually sexy tomboy

Red haired beauty with a friendly attitude. She is the most popular girl at the cafe, being friends with everyone. She's no easy gal though, her best services are for only the people she likes. She casually does her erotic routine, even as she is having a normal conversation, just to keep her customers on their tip toes.
kink: headpats, anal play(she keep her vagina for the best customer, you~)

They are all able to produce milk because of mommy's secret formula.

(though they won't mind you helping them lactate the natural way)
